series_description: These are applications that were denied by the board for not meeting the minimal qualifications for licensure.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months

series_description: These are records of on-site inspections.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Copy of probation order issued by the board. Included with the notice is a list of conditions that must be fulfilled to restore the license to unrestricted practice.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until license is restored to unrestricted status and no further legal action is pending

series_description: Record of all approved licenses and supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 60 years or until electronically scanned ; Electronic: Retain electronically scanned files for 60 years from date the record is scanned

series_description: These are records of applications from individuals who were educated outside the United States and whose applications were not approved. These records need to be retained for a longer period because of the difficulty in obtaining much of the information in the case of re-application.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: These are applications for licensure that failed to provide all the documentation required for approval.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year after the date the application was received by the Board

series_description: These are records of all applications received for approval of continuing education courses.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: The official minutes, orders, and decisions of the Ohio Occupational Therapy, Physical Therapy, and Athletic Trainers Board, including the official minutes of each Section of the Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for ten years after meeting date

series_description: Results of criminal records checks conducted by BCI for initial license applicants.
retention_statement: Paper: For no records identified, record that records check was received and

series_description: Results of criminal records checks received from the FBI for initial license applicants.
retention_statement: Paper: For results with no records identified, dispose of immediately. For results with criminal records identified, collect the relevant information from the appropriate courts and

series_description: Application for renewal of license. Included is the supporting documentation that verifies that the requirements for license renewal have been fulfilled.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after expiration of renewal period

series_description: This is supporting documentation received without an application being received.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: These are summaries of investigations, on-site inspections, and consent agreements for enforcement review panel review.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: These are applications for licensure where applicant failed the examination.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: This series consists of complaint forms used to file complaints against licensees and non-licensed persons, along with investigative reports, notes, statements, and evidence, including exhibits submitted at hearing and the transcript of an administrative hearing. It does not include notices for opportunity for hearing, consent agreements, and/or adjudication orders.
retention_statement: Paper: If case is closed with no action taken, retain in office area for 5 years after closure date If action is taken, retain in office area for 10 years after the date of the action Do not destroy any notices for opportunity for hearing, consent agreements, and/or adjudication orders, since those documents have historic and reference value.

series_description: Digital audio recordings that are used in the preparation of the minutes of Board meetings.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until the meeting minutes are officially adopted and

series_description: Information pertaining to the audit of compliance with the continuing education requirements. This may include correspondence, certified mail receipts, CE tracking forms, certificates of completion, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: If licensee is not compliant with CE requirement, send to enforcement file; if licensee is compliant, retain until the audit cycle is complete ; Electronic: This media applies if the licensee scans and emails the audit information and the staff does not print the attachments. If licensee is not compliant with CE requirement, send to enforcement file; if licensee is compliant, retain until the audit cycle is complete

series_description: Results of surveys completed electronically through Survey Monkey. Types of surveys include customer satisfaction surveys, surveys seeking input on potential rules changes, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until provides no further administrative value.

series_description: These web pages are not maintained by the Board, but are instead maintained by a social media web page (e.g.: Facebook, Twitter). the Board may regularly post information on these social media web pages. Records in the series may include, but are not limited to, press releases, photos, events, and general information about the Board. Social media sites will be used as a supplemental, not primary, marketing tool for the Board. Information posted that falls under a separate retention schedule will be kept according to that retention schedule.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until updated or no longer of administrative value.

series_description: These are scores from exam for licensure.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after results entered into computer system (1998 - present)

series_description: These are notices sent to individuals when their application is denied or the section intends to consider the suspension or revocation of a license indicating that they are to receive a hearing.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year
